tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"echo '===FORENSICS LISTING==='; ls -la /root/forensics || true; echo '--- hping3.sha256 ---'; cat /root/forensics/hping3.sha256 || echo 'missing hping3.sha256'; echo '--- splunkd.sha256 ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.sha256 || echo 'missing splunkd.sha256'; echo '--- splunkd.path ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.path || echo 'missing splunkd.path'; echo '--- splunkd.CAPBEFORE ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPBEFORE || cat /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status || echo 'missing CAPBEFORE'; echo '--- splunkd.CAPAFTER ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER || cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER || echo 'missing CAPAFTER'; echo '--- iptables.save ---'; cat /root/forensics/iptables.save || (iptables-save > /root/forensics/iptables.current && cat /root/forensics/iptables.current) || echo 'no iptables file and iptables-save failed'; echo '--- splunkd.newpid ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid || echo 'missing splunkd.newpid'; echo '--- CURRENT SPLUNKD PROCESS INFO ---'; pgrep -af '/usr/src/app/splunkd' || ps aux | egrep '[s]plunkd|/usr/src/app/splunkd' || true; PIDS=$(pgrep -f '/usr/src/app/splunkd' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n \"$PIDS\" ]; then for pid in $PIDS; do echo \"pid:$pid\"; grep CapEff /proc/$pid/status || echo \"no /proc/$pid/status\"; done; else echo 'no running splunkd found via pgrep'; fi; echo '--- /proc/344/status CapEff ---'; if [ -f /proc/344/status ]; then grep CapEff /proc/344/status || true; else echo '/proc/344/status not present'; fi; echo '===END==='"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
echo '===FORENSICS LISTING==='; ls -la /root/foorensics || true; echo '--- hping3.sha256 ---'; cat /root/forensics/hping3.sha2566 || echo 'missing hping3.sha256'; echo '--- splunkd.sha256 ---'; cat /root/forennsics/splunkd.sha256 || echo 'missing splunkd.sha256'; echo '--- splunkd.path ----'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.path || echo 'missing splunkd.path'; echo '--- spplunkd.CAPBEFORE ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPBEFORE || cat /root/forensiics/splunkd.proc.status || echo 'missing CAPBEFORE'; echo '--- splunkd.CAPAFTER ----'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER || cat /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTEER || echo 'missing CAPAFTER'; echo '--- iptables.save ---'; cat /root/forensics//iptables.save || (iptables-save > /root/forensics/iptables.current && cat /root//forensics/iptables.current) || echo 'no iptables file and iptables-save failed';; echo '--- splunkd.newpid ---'; cat /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid || echo 'misssing splunkd.newpid'; echo '--- CURRENT SPLUNKD PROCESS INFO ---'; pgrep -af '/ussr/src/app/splunkd' || ps aux | egrep '[s]plunkd|/usr/src/app/splunkd' || true; PPIDS=$(pgrep -f '/usr/src/app/splunkd' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; tthen for pid in $PIDS; do echo "pid:$pid"; grep CapEff /proc/$pid/status || echo  "no /proc/$pid/status"; done; else echo 'no running splunkd found via pgrep'; fii; echo '--- /proc/344/status CapEff ---'; if [ -f /proc/344/status ]; then grep  CapEff /proc/344/status || true; else echo '/proc/344/status not present'; fi; eecho '===END==='
